query: summarise One Piece is authored by Eiichiro Oda.  As of June 2026, the anime has released 1,164 episodes (with some sources citing up to 1,165). Regarding the manga catch-up:The anime is currently in the Elbaph arc (Season 22), which began in April 2026. Historically, the anime averaged 40–50 chapters behind the manga. Production schedules have shifted significantly; the anime is now capped at a maximum of 26 episodes per year to reduce the gap, while the manga is entering its Final Saga. A new animated remake produced by Wit Studio is scheduled to release on Netflix in February 2027, which will retell the story from the beginning.

The anime is now limited to a maximum of 26 episodes per year to decrease this gap, while the manga is entering its Final Saga.
